boolean_policy.description: Defines whether to enforce a boolean constraint on the organization, specifying true or false based on the policy requirement.

constraint.description: Defines the specific constraint to enforce within the organization policy, such as restrictions on resource configurations or usage.

google_organization_policy_version.description: Specifies the version of the organization policy schema to use; must be a valid schema version.

list_policy.description: Defines the rules and constraints for a list-based organization policy, specifying allowed or denied values for resources within the organization.
list_policy.type: list(object({inherit_from_parent: optional(bool),suggested_value: optional(string),allow: list(object({all: optional(bool),values: optional(list(string))})),deny: list(object({all: optional(bool),values: optional(list(string))}))}))

org_id.description: ID of the organization where the policy will be applied. Must be a valid organization ID.

restore_policy.description: Specifies whether the organization policy can be restored to its previous state, requiring adherence to organizational compliance rules.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration settings for create, update, and delete operations on the organization policy, ensuring proper execution timing.
